---
description: Plan an issue from start to finish.
allowed-tools:
  - Read
  - Bash
next:
  mode: open
  candidates:
    - name: mach12:issue-review
      hint: Use when the plan is non-trivial or touches risky areas.
    - name: mach12:issue-implement
      hint: Use when the plan is small and uncontroversial.
---

Plan body text. The agent reads this to perform the work.
